svg.title: HLS Audio Streaming
svg.desc: End-to-end diagram of how HLS breaks an MP3 into chunks, serves them, and plays them continuously on a client device.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What audio formats can be used as HLS source?')
sendPrompt('How does FFmpeg segment audio for HLS?')
sendPrompt('What is a .ts transport stream audio chunk?')
sendPrompt('What does an .m3u8 playlist file contain?')
sendPrompt('How does an HTTP server serve HLS content?')
sendPrompt('How does an HLS audio player buffer and play chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does HLS achieve seamless continuous audio playback?')
